content.p: The board of directors of Federal Prison Industries shall submit an annual report to the Congress on the conduct of the business of the corporation during each fiscal year, and on the condition of its funds during such fiscal year. Such report shall include a statement of the amount of obligations issued under section 4129(a)(1) during such fiscal year, and an estimate of the amount of obligations that will be so issued in the following fiscal year.

note.heading: Historical and Revision Notes
note.p: Words “of Federal Prison Industries” were inserted after “board of directors”.
Minor changes were made in phraseology.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 1988—Pub. L. 100–690 amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “The board of directors of Federal Prison Industries shall make annual reports to Congress on the conduct of the business of the corporation and on the condition of its funds.”

note.heading: Termination of Reporting Requirements
note.p: For termination, effective May 15, 2000, of reporting provisions in this section, see section 3003 of Pub. L. 104–66, as amended, set out as a note under section 1113 of Title 31, Money and Finance, and page 117 of House Document No. 103–7.
